# DocJacket Help Center

> Help documentation for DocJacket — the AI-powered transaction coordination platform for real estate professionals.
> URL: https://help.docjacket.com
> Product URL: https://docjacket.com
> App URL: https://app.docjacket.com

## About DocJacket

DocJacket is an AI coordination platform built for independent Transaction Coordinators (TCs) in real estate. It uses preparation-first automation where AI handles prep work (contract extraction, timeline building, email sorting, communication drafts) and TCs stay fully in control through approval-based workflows.

## Help Sections

- [Getting Started](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/getting-started): Account setup, first transaction, navigation, roles
- [Transactions](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/transactions): Creating and managing deals from contract to closing
- [AI Features](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/ai-features): Contract extraction, AI task generation, insights, smart document splitting
- [Documents](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/documents): Uploading, AI extraction, audit mode, Google Drive, DocDrop
- [Client Portal](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/client-portal): Branded portal for buyers, sellers, and agents
- [Tasks](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/tasks): Task management, templates, subtasks, email automation
- [Calendar & Deadlines](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/calendar): Timeline templates, anchor dates, calendar view
- [Messages & Email](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/messages): Unified inbox, sending emails, email templates
- [Templates](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/templates): Timeline, task, and email templates
- [Contacts](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/contacts): Contact management, roles, and groups
- [Workflows](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/workflows): Automated workflow monitoring and approvals
- [Integrations](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/integrations): Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, webhooks
- [Reports](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/reports): Transaction reports and pipeline view
- [Settings](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/settings): Organization config, user management, notifications
- [Billing](https://help.docjacket.com/docs/billing): Plans, pricing, and subscription management

## Optional

- [Full documentation](https://help.docjacket.com/llms-full.txt): Complete help content for all sections
